I agree with the previous conclusion. Tafenoquine has been rigorously studied and approved solely for radical cure of *Plasmodium vivax*, as it targets dormant liver stages (hypnozoites), which no other antimalarial does effectively. The WHO endorses this specific application only—there's no safe or effective evidence supporting its use in pregnancy prophylaxis, treating severe falciparum, or using in infants under two years old.
